item.title: Fact or Fiction: Using a Gas Forge
item.description: Explore the truths and myths of using a gas forge, including safety tips, efficiency, and best practices for blacksmithing and metalworking projects.

media:content.media:title: Fact or Fiction: Using a Gas Forge
media:content.media:description: Explore the truths and myths of using a gas forge, including safety tips, efficiency, and best practices for blacksmithing and metalworking projects.

item.title: Making Steel Coffee Scoops
item.description: Step-by-step guide to crafting steel coffee scoops, from shaping and forging to finishing, creating durable and precise tools for everyday use.

media:content.media:title: Making Steel Coffee Scoops
media:content.media:description: Step-by-step guide to crafting steel coffee scoops, from shaping and forging to finishing, creating durable and precise tools for everyday use.

item.title: Making Copper and Steel Coffee Scoops
item.description: Watch the process of crafting durable coffee scoops from copper and steel, with precise shaping, finishing, and practical design details for daily use.

media:content.media:title: Making Copper and Steel Coffee Scoops
media:content.media:description: Watch the process of crafting durable coffee scoops from copper and steel, with precise shaping, finishing, and practical design details for daily use.

item.title: How to Choose the Right Anvil
item.description: A clear guide to selecting the right anvil based on weight, material, and use. Practical tips for beginners and experienced metalworkers alike.

media:content.media:title: How to Choose the Right Anvil
media:content.media:description: A clear guide to selecting the right anvil based on weight, material, and use. Practical tips for beginners and experienced metalworkers alike.

item.title: Turn an Old Gas Cylinder Into a Bell
item.description: A step-by-step blacksmithing walkthrough showing how to transform an old gas cylinder into a functional, handcrafted bell.

media:content.media:title: Turn an Old Gas Cylinder Into a Bell
media:content.media:description: A step-by-step blacksmithing walkthrough showing how to transform an old gas cylinder into a functional, handcrafted bell.

item.title: Classic Blacksmithing Method Explained
item.description: A look at a traditional blacksmithing method, demonstrating time-tested techniques used to shape and forge metal with precision.

media:content.media:title: Classic Blacksmithing Method Explained
media:content.media:description: A look at a traditional blacksmithing method, demonstrating time-tested techniques used to shape and forge metal with precision.

item.title: Turning Salvage Steel Into a Bending Fork
item.description: Watch salvage steel get transformed into a functional bending fork using practical blacksmithing techniques and efficient toolmaking.

media:content.media:title: Turning Salvage Steel Into a Bending Fork
media:content.media:description: Watch salvage steel get transformed into a functional bending fork using practical blacksmithing techniques and efficient toolmaking.

item.title: Forging a Prospector’s Trowel
item.description: See the process of forging a prospector’s trowel, from shaping steel to finishing touches, highlighting traditional blacksmithing craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Prospector’s Trowel
media:content.media:description: See the process of forging a prospector’s trowel, from shaping steel to finishing touches, highlighting traditional blacksmithing craftsmanship.

item.title: Forging Jingle Bells for the Holidays
item.description: Get into the holiday spirit by forging handcrafted jingle bells, showcasing metalworking skills and festive blacksmithing techniques.

media:content.media:title: Forging Jingle Bells for the Holidays
media:content.media:description: Get into the holiday spirit by forging handcrafted jingle bells, showcasing metalworking skills and festive blacksmithing techniques.

item.title: Traditional Blacksmithing Tongs
item.description: Learn how to forge blacksmithing tongs using traditional techniques, emphasizing craftsmanship, durability, and classic metalworking methods.

media:content.media:title: Traditional Blacksmithing Tongs
media:content.media:description: Learn how to forge blacksmithing tongs using traditional techniques, emphasizing craftsmanship, durability, and classic metalworking methods.

item.title: Forging a Metal Scoop
item.description: Watch a metal scoop take shape as we forge it from raw steel, demonstrating blacksmithing techniques and careful craftsmanship.

media:content.media:title: Forging a Metal Scoop
media:content.media:description: Watch a metal scoop take shape as we forge it from raw steel, demonstrating blacksmithing techniques and careful craftsmanship.

item.title: Adapting a Handle for a Weed Whacker
item.description: See how we modify and fit a new handle to a weed whacker, improving comfort, control, and usability with a simple upgrade.

media:content.media:title: Adapting a Handle for a Weed Whacker
media:content.media:description: See how we modify and fit a new handle to a weed whacker, improving comfort, control, and usability with a simple upgrade.
